name: @elizaos/plugin-slack-root
description: Slack integration plugin for elizaOS agents with Socket Mode support
author: elizaOS

scripts.build: bun run build:ts && bun run build:rust && bun run build:python
scripts.build:python: test -n "$SKIP_PYTHON_BUILD" && echo 'Python build skipped (SKIP_PYTHON_BUILD set)' || (test -d python && cd python && (timeout 120 python3 -m build 2>/dev/null || timeout 120 pyproject-build 2>/dev/null) || echo 'Python build skipped or timed out')
scripts.build:rust: test -d rust && cd rust && cargo build --release || echo 'Rust build skipped - no rust directory'
scripts.test: bun run test:ts && bun run test:rust && bun run test:python
scripts.test:rust: test -d rust && cd rust && cargo test || echo 'Rust tests skipped'
scripts.test:python: test -d python && cd python && pytest -p no:anchorpy --asyncio-mode=auto || echo 'Python tests skipped'

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.description: Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...) for API authentication

SLACK_APP_TOKEN.description: Slack App Token (xapp-...) for Socket Mode connections

SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.description: Slack Signing Secret for verifying requests

SLACK_USER_TOKEN.description: Optional User Token (xoxp-...) for enhanced permissions

SLACK_CHANNEL_IDS.description: Comma-separated list of channel IDs to restrict the bot to

SLACK_SHOULD_IGNORE_BOT_MESSAGES.description: If true, the bot will ignore messages from other bots

SLACK_SHOULD_RESPOND_ONLY_TO_MENTIONS.description: If true, the bot will only respond when mentioned
